allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: initial monorepo setup with client and API

Monorepo structure with TanStack Start client and C# ASP.NET API.
Client includes Claude Code configuration, Mantine v8, Better Auth,
and TanStack ecosystem. API includes controllers, services, EF Core
migrations, and EdDSA JWT security. Appsettings excluded from tracking
\(contains secrets\).
EOF
\)")

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs npx prettier --write 2>/dev/null || true
